title: Clutter Prevention Enforcement Suite — Final Integration Report
description: Complete enforcement system integrating four independent clutter prevention gates through orchestrated validation

enforcement_rules.name: DAG Documentation Enforcement
enforcement_rules.purpose: Validate all .roadmap/head.*.json files have required structure and documentation

checks.name: Required fields
checks.validates: id, desc, init, term, nodes present

checks.name: Node structure
checks.validates: Each node has id and desc

checks.name: Init/term validity
checks.validates: Init and term nodes exist in nodes map

checks.name: Orphan detection
checks.validates: No valid DAGs unreferenced as active head

checks.name: Documentation presence
checks.validates: Design docs exist for each DAG

enforcement_rules.name: Design Doc Commitment Enforcement
enforcement_rules.purpose: Block commits with untracked design docs in .roadmap/
enforcement_rules.note: Enforced at git hook level; orchestration node notes integration readiness

enforcement_rules.name: Task List Hygiene Enforcement
enforcement_rules.purpose: Maintain task list quality: no stale tasks, evidence on completion

checks.name: Valid status
checks.validates: Status is one of: pending, in_progress, completed

checks.name: Stale detection
checks.validates: No in_progress tasks without update for 48+ hours

enforcement_rules.name: Worktree Cleanup Enforcement
enforcement_rules.purpose: Auto-detect and report stale/orphaned git worktrees

integration.orchestration: Sequential evaluation of all 4 rules, aggregated report with violations and remediation

report_structure.rules: Array of 4 EnforcementRule objects with pass/fail status
report_structure.violations: Aggregated list of all violations with severity and remediation
report_structure.allPassed: Boolean indicating if all rules passed
report_structure.summary: Human-readable summary (pass count or error/warning counts)

integration_test_coverage: Task validation isolation (invalid status, stale detection, missing evidence)
DAG validation isolation (invalid structure, orphan detection, missing docs)
Rule isolation (failures in one rule don't affect others)

maintenance.configuration: Thresholds hardcoded; can be moved to .roadmap/enforcement-config.json in future

success_criteria.evidence: enforceClutterPrevention() returns ClutterPreventionReport with all 4 rules
15 + N + N + N unit tests across modules

success_criteria.criterion: Integration tests covering all rules + combinations

success_criteria.evidence: clutter-prevention-report.json describes all gates and integration

success_criteria.criterion: DAG node produces all required artifacts

next_steps: Invoke WorktreeCleanup on session end via post-session-cleanup.sh
Collect feedback on threshold tuning (48h stale tasks, 7d stale worktrees)
Consider expansion: config file, notifications, dashboard
